top_signals.title: Fixing the Social Security Problem Can't Wait, Says Jack Lew
top_signals.summary: Jack Lew, former US Treasury Secretary, joins Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." Projections in the latest annual Social Security Trustees says there could be severe shortfalls in funding by 2032. Lew says that's unacceptable and government can't wait to fix the problems. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
